description.value: [Source: GB19] The most common of the drugs on the market derived from harpy jasmine, white petal causes a mild, dreamy high that lends itself to restful sleep. DETAIL Type injury (injected); Addiction minor, Fortitude DC 13; Price 60 gp EFFECT 10 hours; â2 penalty to initiative checks and regain an additional 1d4 hit points when recovering hit points naturally. During this time, gain detect magic as a spell-like ability (CL 2nd), usable three times. DAMAGE 1d2 Charisma damage
